codeReview.summary: Implementation matches the feature scope: 11 duplicated local getTestPort() helpers in relay/auth/e2ee tests were replaced with imports from test/helpers/test-port.ts, and the shared helper preserves identical behavior (return 0 for OS-assigned ephemeral ports), so determinism/collision mitigation behavior is unchanged.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The mors-global-worker skill mandates strict red/green TDD for all features, but this refactor-only feature had no behavioral change and did not use a true red phase; guidance should explicitly define/refine exceptions for pure infrastructure refactors.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/mors-global-worker/SKILL.md (Work Procedure step 2) requires strict red/green; transcript skeleton for workerSessionId eec09fcf-282e-4486-a17b-d9b56f28412b shows baseline tests then edits (no failing-test-first step); handoff.skillFeedback.suggestedChanges explicitly notes TDD not applicable for this refactor.

summary: Pass. The commit cleanly consolidates duplicated test port helpers to the shared helper with no functional drift and no code-level issues found. One shared-state skill-guidance gap was noted around strict TDD expectations for pure refactor tasks.
